summary.en: Casella Winery’s [yellow tail] entered the crowded 2001 US wine market by making wine simple, fun, and easy to drink for non-wine consumers, becoming one of the fastest-growing imported wine brands.
summary.zh: Casella Winery 的黄尾袋鼠在 2001 年进入拥挤的美国葡萄酒市场，把葡萄酒变得简单、有趣、容易入口，吸引非葡萄酒消费者，成为增长最快的进口葡萄酒品牌之一。

sources.label: Blue Ocean Strategy teaching materials · Yellow Tail

headline.en: A simple entry point into Blue Ocean Strategy
headline.zh: 进入蓝海战略的简单入口案例

whyOpen.en: Yellow Tail is useful because the value curve is easy to see: reduce wine complexity, raise approachability, and create fun for non-wine drinkers.
whyOpen.zh: 黄尾袋鼠适合作为入门案例，因为价值曲线很容易看见：降低葡萄酒复杂度，提升易饮性，并为非葡萄酒消费者创造轻松乐趣。

audience.en: Beginners learning competitive factors, noncustomers, and ERIC moves.
audience.zh: 适合学习竞争因子、非顾客和 ERIC 动作的新手。

commonMisreads.en: The case is not about making wine cheap; it is about changing the buying and drinking experience for people outside the category.
commonMisreads.zh: 这个案例不是把酒做便宜，而是改变品类外人群的购买和饮用体验。

practicePrompts.en: Which category rituals make your offer intimidating to noncustomers?
practicePrompts.zh: 你所在品类的哪些仪式感让非顾客望而却步？
